paladin.name: Paladin
paladin.description: A champion of Civilization who protects allies and smites evil.

engine_passive.name: Aura of Protection
engine_passive.description: Your Protection resonance also applies to allies in the same room.

bard.name: Bard
bard.description: A support-oriented musician who uses melodies to buff and disrupt.

cleric.name: Cleric
cleric.description: A divine caster focused on healing, protection, and purging evil.

engine_passive.name: Divine Conduit
engine_passive.description: Restoration tagged blessings have a 10% chance to cleanse one negative Manifestation.

elementalist.name: Elementalist
elementalist.description: A mage who chains elemental spells for devastating combos.

engine_passive.name: Elemental Chain
engine_passive.description: Switching between different Elemental flavors grants 5% increased Potency for 3 ticks.

knight.name: Knight
knight.description: A heavily armored warrior with defensive magic and strong melee capabilities.

engine_passive.name: Bulwark Stance
engine_passive.description: While using a [weight] tagged piece of gear, Martial Potency is increased by 15%.

chemist.name: Chemist
chemist.description: A battlefield support expert using potions for healing and buffs.

engine_passive.name: Experimental Brew
engine_passive.description: Blessings with the [utility] tag have a 20% chance to not trigger their cooldown tick.

engineer.name: Engineer
engineer.description: A mid-range battlefield manipulator focused on deployables.

engine_passive.name: Tinker
engine_passive.description: Manifestations originating from [utility] tagged blessings have 25% increased duration.

machinist.name: Machinist
machinist.description: Excels at long-term battlefield management through autonomous drones.

engine_passive.name: Overdrive
engine_passive.description: Your Utility-based Manifestations (Drones) tick twice per heartbeat.

mage.name: Mage
mage.description: The Lord of Magic's disciple, wielding raw arcane force.

engine_passive.name: Arcane Flow
engine_passive.description: Direct damage blessings ([strike] or [projection]) cost 10% less resource/tick.

priest.name: Priest
priest.description: The strongest raw healer, using divine magic to restore HP.

engine_passive.name: Sacrosanct
engine_passive.description: While at full HP, your Restoration resonance is increased by 20%.

soldier.name: Soldier
soldier.description: Tactically trained infantry excelling at weapon adaptability.

engine_passive.name: Weapon Versatility
engine_passive.description: Increases the Scaling Factor of your primary weapon's Flavor tag (e.g., Slashing/Blunt) by 0.5.

white_mage.name: White Mage
white_mage.description: A pure healer dedicated to restoration and protection.

engine_passive.name: Pure Heart
engine_passive.description: Your Restoration effects cannot be interrupted by [disruption] tags.

silver_mage.name: Silver Mage
silver_mage.description: A support-oriented caster enhancing speed and light.

engine_passive.name: Quickening
engine_passive.description: Reduces the Tick Cooldown of all Blessings in your deck by 1.

guardian.name: Guardian
guardian.description: A holy defender of the weak.
